## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss onboarding processes and address company structure changes affecting employee contracts and payments.](https://fathom.video/share/g3xLsm3a8R56RXSfPsyyhnBBExCABS8a?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company transitioning from LLC to C Corp, impacting Remote.com onboarding and existing contracts](https://fathom.video/share/g3xLsm3a8R56RXSfPsyyhnBBExCABS8a?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Three new hires starting soon; two next Monday, one the following week (President's Day complication)](https://fathom.video/share/g3xLsm3a8R56RXSfPsyyhnBBExCABS8a?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

  - [Awaiting guidance from Bridget on immediate cessation of LLC-related processes](https://fathom.video/share/g3xLsm3a8R56RXSfPsyyhnBBExCABS8a?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure Transition
